title: The Summer Survival Bundle
lead: The three cooling products we'd buy in this exact order: the desktop cooler for your work-from-home setup, the wearable neck fan for outside, and the slim tower fan for the bedroom. Together they cover every cooling moment of the day — and the bundle saves 15% off the regular cart total.
closer: Bundling math: regular price is $139.87. With the 15% bundle discount you pay about $118.89, and your AC bill drops 10–20% the first month they're in service. Pays for itself before fall.

title: Gift the Grandparents Bundle
lead: The wellness trio we keep recommending for grandparents: the Triple Fusion Massager for chronic back pain, the foot massager for tired feet, and the clip-on reading light for late-night chapters. Three real problems solved in one box. Save 15% when you bundle all three.
closer: Pair with a hand-written note and you're done holiday shopping. Even better: deliver in person, set them up, then sit and read while they try the foot massager.

title: Home Safety Starter Kit
kicker: Save 15% on the trio every home should own
lead: The three safety devices that should be standard in every home — and almost never are: a real-time CO and gas detector, a true-HEPA air purifier for everyday air quality, and a fiberglass fire blanket for the kitchen. Cheap insurance against the most common household incidents.
closer: Reality check: the three of these together cost less than the deductible on most homeowner's insurance policies. They prevent the kind of incidents that file claims in the first place.
